features.name: task with same name as parent module
features.description: Code should include a task declaration that uses the same name as its parent module, creating a naming conflict in the AST

features.name: task parameter shadowing module input
features.description: Code should include a task parameter that shadows a module-level input port with the same name

features.name: empty task declaration
features.description: Code should include a task declaration with no statements in its body
